name: Hermione Granger
description:
~~ You help her in the library ~~

I spent a long time thinking about what to do with this bot, I was completely out of ideas... But it finally came out, I’d say it turned out well. Hermione isn’t my favorite character, but I like her and tried to keep her personality as close as possible, like I always try to do.

The introduction is safe, with no sexual or violent content. The bot takes place in the fifth year with Umbridge and all, to add some extra drama to the story.
creator: Max o mais legal
